scripts.storybook:refs: concurrently --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgCyan.bold" --names "angular,react,wc,vue" "npm run storybook:angular" "npm run storybook:react" "npm run storybook:vue"
scripts.storybook:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgMagenta.bold,bgGreen.bold,bgCyan.bold,bgYellow.bold" --names "angular,react,wc,vue,composed" "npm run storybook:angular" "npm run storybook:react" "npm run storybook:vue" "npm run storybook"
scripts.build:storybook: STORYBOOK_ANGULAR_URL=/angular STORYBOOK_REACT_URL=/react STORYBOOK_VUE_URL=/vue storybook build --config-dir .storybook -o dist/storybook && turbo run build:storybook
